What to Expect out of Pure Barre
Join us at the barre for a Free Barre Class. Meet our teachers and learn the Pure Barre technique with your local studio community. Experience the benefits of our low-impact, high-intensity group workouts!
## Book Your Free Class!
*Available at Participating Studios.

Try Pure Barre
Join us at the barre for a Free Barre Class. Meet our teachers and learn the Pure Barre technique with your local studio community. Experience the benefits of our low-impact, high-intensity group workouts!
![](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/custom-video-thumbnails/PB_FFS-thumb.jpeg)
## new to pure barre
Pure Barre invites everybody to join a total-body fitness experience with us at the barre. our group classes focus on low-impact, small movements that stregnthen and tone your entire body in 50 minutes or less.
[Get a FREE Barre Class](https://www.purebarre.com/expectations#top)
*Limited Availability
## What is our Free Foundations Intro Class
If you're new to Pure Barre, or even barre, this is a great place to start. Our small group class guide you through the basic movements of Pure Barre through a series of low-impact, high-intensity movements designed to strengthen and tone your body. This class will help build confidence as you discover how our technique works and all the benefits barre has to offer.
## our barre classes
If you're new to Pure Barre, or even barre, this is a great place to start. Our small group class guides you through the basic movements of Pure Barre through a series of low-impact, high-intensity movements designed to strengthen and tone your body. This class will help build confidence as you discover how our technique works and all the benefits barre has to offer.
### Foundations 
Free Introductory Class 
If you're new to Pure Barre or even barre, this is a great place to start. Our small group class guides you through the basic movements of Pure Barre through a series of low-impact, high-intensity movements designed to strengthen and tone your body. This class will help build confidence as you discover how our technique works and all the benefits barre has to offer. 
Your browser doesn't support HTML5 video. Here is a [link to the video](https://www.purebarre.com/hubfs/Foundations_FINAL.mp4) instead.
### Classic 
Ball + Weights + Double Tube 
Classic is our original barre class. Our proprietary tehcnique is the fastest most effective low-impact, full-body barre workout. For 50 minutes you will be guided through a series of low-impact, high-intensity isometric movements designed to improve your flexibility while strengthening and toning your body. 
### Pure Reform 
Resistance + Strength + Sliders 
Pure Refform is our full-body barre workout that targets and reshapes all your major muscle groups through resistance-based strength training. This 50-minute barre class blends our classic Pure Barre technique with resistance-based movements that build your strength, coordination and balance using resistance bands, sliders, and the barre. 
Your browser doesn't support HTML5 video. Here is a [link to the video](https://www.purebarre.com/hubfs/Foundations_FINAL.mp4) instead.
### Pure Empower 
Cardio + Barre + Interval Training 
Pure Empower is our fusion of classic barre and cardio-centric interval training designed to elevate your heart rate, build strength and rev up your metabolism. For 45 minutes you'll use dynamic movements with ankle weights and a plyometric platform to target different muscle groups simultaneiously - all at an invigorating pace. 
[Get a FREE Barre Class](https://www.purebarre.com/expectations#top)
*Limited Availability
